mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tutor_appointment (parent_id, tutor_id, parent_job_posting_id, tutor_job_posting_id, subject_id, class_mode, city, address, start_time, duration_minutes, status, created_by, proposed_start_time, proposed_by, cancel_by, remark) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{tutorId}, #{parentJobPostingId}, #{tutorJobPostingId}, #{subjectId}, #{classMode}, #{city}, #{address}, #{startTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{proposedStartTime}, #{proposedBy}, #{cancelBy}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, tutor_id, parent_job_posting_id, tutor_job_posting_id, subject_id, class_mode, city, address, start_time, duration_minutes, status, created_by, proposed_start_time, proposed_by, cancel_by, remark, create_time, update_time FROM tutor_appointment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tutor_appointment SET status = 2, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE tutor_appointment SET start_time = proposed_start_time, proposed_start_time = NULL, proposed_by = NULL, status = 2, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
